toolkits.name: 1password
toolkits.description: Password manager and digital vault for secure credential storage and team collaboration
toolkits.oneLiner: 1Password stores and secures your passwords, credit cards, and private documents in an encrypted digital vault. / 1Password almacena y asegura sus contraseñas, tarjetas de crédito y documentos privados en una bóveda digital cifrada. / O 1Password armazena e protege suas senhas, cartões de crédito e documentos privados em um cofre digital criptografado.

toolkits.oneLiner: Cincopa provides tools to host, manage, and embed multimedia content like videos and images. / Cincopa ofrece herramientas para alojar, gestionar e insertar contenido multimedia como videos e imágenes. / Cincopa oferece ferramentas para hospedar, gerenciar e incorporar conteúdo multimídia como vídeos e imagens.

toolkits.name: CircleCI
toolkits.description: CircleCI is a continuous integration and delivery platform that automates build, test, and deployment pipelines for software development.
toolkits.oneLiner: CircleCI automates software build, test, and deployment pipelines. / CircleCI automatiza los pipelines de construcción, prueba y despliegue de software. / O CircleCI automatiza pipelines de construção, teste e implantação de software.

toolkits.name: Claid.ai

toolkits.oneLiner: Claid.ai offers AI-powered image editing APIs for tasks like background removal, upscaling, and color correction.
useCases: Automate background removal for product photos
Mejorar la calidad de fotos de productos

toolkits.oneLiner: ClassMarker allows users to create, distribute, and grade online quizzes and exams. / ClassMarker permite crear, distribuir y calificar exámenes y cuestionarios en línea. / O ClassMarker permite criar, distribuir e avaliar questionários e exames online.

toolkits.oneLiner: Clearout validates email addresses and finds contact information to improve deliverability. / Clearout valida direcciones de correo y encuentra información de contacto para mejorar la entregabilidad. / Clearout valida endereços de e-mail e encontra informações de contato para melhorar a entregabilidade.

toolkits.name: ClickHouse

toolkits.oneLiner: ClickHouse is a high-performance column-oriented database for real-time analytics and big data processing. / ClickHouse es una base de datos orientada a columnas de alto rendimiento para analítica en tiempo real y procesamiento de big data. / ClickHouse é um banco de dados orientado a colunas de alto desempenho para análise em tempo real e processamento de big data.

toolkits.oneLiner: ClickUp is a project management platform that organizes tasks, documents, and team collaboration. / ClickUp es una plataforma de gestión de proyectos que organiza tareas, documentos y la colaboración en equipo. / O ClickUp é uma plataforma de gerenciamento de projetos que organiza tarefas, documentos e a colaboração em equipe.

toolkits.name: Clientary

toolkits.oneLiner: A full-suite platform to manage Clients, Invoices, Projects, Proposals, Estimates, Hours, Payments, Contractors and Staff. The perfect solution to win clients and save time.

toolkits.name: Cloudflare
toolkits.description: Cloudflare is a global network designed to make everything you connect to the Internet secure, private, fast, and reliable.
toolkits.oneLiner: Cloudflare provides web security, performance optimization, and reliability services for websites and applications. / Cloudflare ofrece seguridad web, optimización de rendimiento y servicios de fiabilidad para sitios y aplicaciones. / Cloudflare oferece segurança web, otimização de desempenho e serviços de confiabilidade para sites e aplicativos.

Proteger contra ataques de negação de serviço

toolkits.oneLiner: Cloudflare API Key allows programmatic management of web security, performance, and DNS settings. / Cloudflare API Key permite la gestión programática de seguridad web, rendimiento y configuración DNS. / Cloudflare API Key permite o gerenciamento programático de segurança web, desempenho e configurações de DNS.

toolkits.oneLiner: Cloudflare Browser Rendering allows developers to programmatically control headless browsers for web automation and data extraction. / Cloudflare Browser Rendering permite a los desarrolladores controlar navegadores headless para automatización web y extracción de datos. / O Cloudflare Browser Rendering permite aos desenvolvedores controlar navegadores headless para automação web e extração de dados.

toolkits.oneLiner: Cloudlayer generates PDFs and images dynamically via API for automated document creation. / Cloudlayer genera PDFs e imágenes dinámicamente mediante API para la creación automatizada de documentos. / O Cloudlayer gera PDFs e imagens dinamicamente via API para a criação automatizada de documentos.

toolkits.oneLiner: DocuPost converts digital files into physical mail sent via the U.S. Postal Service. / DocuPost convierte archivos digitales en correo físico enviado a través del Servicio Postal de EE. UU. / DocuPost converte arquivos digitais em correspondência física enviada via Serviço Postal dos EUA.

toolkits.oneLiner: Extracta.ai automates data extraction from documents like PDFs and images using AI. / Extracta.ai automatiza la extracción de datos de documentos como PDFs e imágenes usando IA. / Extracta.ai automatiza a extração de dados de documentos como PDFs e imagens usando IA.

toolkits.name: Facebook

toolkits.oneLiner: Facebook allows users to manage business pages, share content, and run advertising campaigns. / Facebook permite a los usuarios gestionar páginas de empresa, compartir contenido y realizar campañas publicitarias. / O Facebook permite que os usuários gerenciem páginas comerciais, compartilhem conteúdo e executem campanhas publicitárias.

toolkits.oneLiner: FaceUp allows users to submit anonymous reports about misconduct or safety concerns within their organization. / FaceUp permite a los usuarios enviar reportes anónimos sobre mala conducta o preocupaciones de seguridad en su organización. / O FaceUp permite que os usuários enviem denúncias anônimas sobre má conduta ou preocupações de segurança em sua organização.

denunciar irregularidades no ambiente de trabalho

toolkits.name: Fidel API
toolkits.description: Fidel API provides a developer-friendly, secure, and reliable API for businesses to link payment cards with mobile and web applications, enabling real-time transaction monitoring and event-based experiences.
toolkits.oneLiner: Fidel API connects payment cards to applications for real-time transaction monitoring and event-based experiences. / Fidel API conecta tarjetas de pago a aplicaciones para monitoreo de transacciones en tiempo real y experiencias basadas en eventos. / A Fidel API conecta cartões de pagamento a aplicativos para monitoramento de transações em tempo real e experiências baseadas em eventos.

toolkits.description: A collaborative interface design tool.

toolkits.oneLiner: Fingertip manages business operations, product sales, client bookings, and social media customer connections. / Fingertip gestiona operaciones comerciales, ventas, reservas y conexiones con clientes en redes sociales. / Fingertip gerencia operações comerciais, vendas, agendamentos e conexões com clientes em redes sociais.

toolkits.oneLiner: Firecrawl converts websites into clean markdown for LLMs. / Firecrawl convierte sitios web en markdown limpio para LLMs. / Firecrawl converte sites em markdown limpo para LLMs.

toolkits.name: Geokeo
toolkits.description: Geokeo provides geocoding services, converting addresses to coordinates and vice versa, with a free tier offering 2,500 daily API requests.
toolkits.oneLiner: Geokeo converts addresses into geographic coordinates and coordinates into addresses. / Geokeo convierte direcciones en coordenadas geográficas y coordenadas en direcciones. / Geokeo converte endereços em coordenadas geográficas e coordenadas em endereços.

toolkits.name: Getform
toolkits.description: Getform is a modern form backend platform that enables developers to handle web forms and submissions without setting up a server or writing backend code.
toolkits.oneLiner: Getform provides a backend for web forms to collect and manage submissions without server-side code. / Getform proporciona un backend para formularios web para recopilar y gestionar envíos sin código de servidor. / Getform fornece um backend para formulários web para coletar e gerenciar envios sem código de servidor.
useCases: Recopilar datos de formularios de contacto
Manage form data without backend code

toolkits.name: Getprospect
toolkits.description: Find anyone's business email address. GetProspect provides email discovery and verification from LinkedIn.
toolkits.oneLiner: GetProspect finds and verifies professional email addresses from LinkedIn profiles. / GetProspect encuentra y verifica direcciones de correo electrónico profesionales desde perfiles de LinkedIn. / O GetProspect encontra e verifica endereços de e-mail profissionais a partir de perfis do LinkedIn.

toolkits.name: Gift Up!
toolkits.description: Gift Up! is a digital platform that allows businesses to sell, manage, and redeem gift cards online, integrating seamlessly with websites and apps to streamline gift card transactions and promotions.
toolkits.oneLiner: Gift Up! enables businesses to sell, manage, and redeem digital gift cards directly through their websites. / Gift Up! permite a las empresas vender, gestionar y canjear tarjetas de regalo digitales en sus sitios web. / O Gift Up! permite que empresas vendam, gerenciem e resgatem vales-presente digitais diretamente em seus sites.

toolkits.name: Gigasheet
toolkits.description: Gigasheet is a big data automation platform that offers a spreadsheet-like interface for analyzing and managing large datasets, enabling users to automate tasks, integrate with various data sources, and streamline data workflows.
toolkits.oneLiner: Gigasheet allows users to analyze and manipulate massive datasets using a familiar spreadsheet interface. / Gigasheet permite a los usuarios analizar y manipular conjuntos de datos masivos usando una interfaz de hoja de cálculo familiar. / O Gigasheet permite aos usuários analisar e manipular grandes conjuntos de dados usando uma interface de planilha familiar.

toolkits.name: Giphy
toolkits.description: GIPHY is the first and largest GIF search engine, offering an extensive library of GIFs and Stickers for integration into applications.
toolkits.oneLiner: Giphy provides a searchable library of GIFs and stickers for use in applications. / Giphy ofrece una biblioteca de GIFs y stickers para usar en aplicaciones. / Giphy oferece uma biblioteca de GIFs e stickers para usar em aplicativos.

toolkits.name: Gist
toolkits.description: GitHub Gist is a service provided by GitHub that allows users to share code snippets, notes, and other text-based content. It supports both public and private gists, enabling easy sharing and collaboration.
toolkits.oneLiner: GitHub Gist allows users to create, store, and share code snippets and text notes publicly or privately. / GitHub Gist permite a los usuarios crear, almacenar y compartir fragmentos de código y notas de texto de forma pública o privada. / O GitHub Gist permite que os usuários criem, armazenem e compartilhem trechos de código e notas de texto de forma pública ou privada.

toolkits.name: Gitea
toolkits.description: Community managed lightweight code hosting solution written in Go
toolkits.oneLiner: Gitea is a self-hosted Git service for managing software development projects. / Gitea es un servicio Git autohospedado para gestionar proyectos de desarrollo de software. / Gitea é um serviço Git auto-hospedado para gerenciar projetos de desenvolvimento de software.

toolkits.name: GitHub
toolkits.description: GitHub is a code hosting platform for version control and collaboration, offering Git-based repository management, issue tracking, and continuous integration features
toolkits.oneLiner: GitHub hosts software code and manages version control, collaboration, and project tracking. / GitHub aloja código de software y gestiona control de versiones, colaboración y seguimiento de proyectos. / GitHub hospeda código de software e gerencia controle de versão, colaboração e acompanhamento de projetos.

toolkits.name: GitLab
toolkits.description: A web-based DevOps lifecycle tool that provides a Git repository manager providing wiki, issue-tracking, and CI/CD pipeline features.
toolkits.oneLiner: GitLab manages source code repositories, tracks issues, and automates software deployment pipelines. / GitLab gestiona repositorios de código, rastrea incidencias y automatiza despliegues. / O GitLab gerencia repositórios de código, rastreia problemas e automatiza deploys.
useCases: Gestionar el ciclo de vida DevOps

toolkits.name: Givebutter
toolkits.description: Givebutter is a fundraising platform that offers a free, open, and public API for developers to manage campaigns, track donations, and engage with supporters.
toolkits.oneLiner: Givebutter is a fundraising platform for managing campaigns, tracking donations, and engaging supporters. / Givebutter es una plataforma de recaudación de fondos para gestionar campañas, rastrear donaciones e involucrar a donantes. / Givebutter é uma plataforma de arrecadação de fundos para gerenciar campanhas, rastrear doações e engajar apoiadores.

toolkits.name: Gladia
toolkits.description: Gladia provides state-of-the-art audio transcription and intelligence services through a simple API, enabling real-time and asynchronous transcription, translation, and audio analysis.
toolkits.oneLiner: Gladia provides API-based audio transcription, translation, and intelligence services. / Gladia ofrece servicios de transcripción, traducción e inteligencia de audio mediante API. / Gladia oferece serviços de transcrição, tradução e inteligência de áudio via API.

toolkits.name: Gleap
toolkits.description: Gleap is an all-in-one customer feedback tool for apps and websites, enabling direct communication with users to build better software by discovering their everyday pain points.
toolkits.oneLiner: Gleap collects user feedback, bug reports, and survey responses directly within your software applications. / Gleap recopila comentarios de usuarios, reportes de errores y encuestas directamente en sus aplicaciones. / Gleap coleta feedback de usuários, relatórios de bugs e pesquisas diretamente em seus aplicativos.

toolkits.name: Globalping
toolkits.description: Globalping is a global network of probes that allows users to run network tests like ping, traceroute, and DNS resolve from various locations worldwide.
toolkits.oneLiner: Globalping runs network diagnostics like ping and traceroute from global locations. / Globalping ejecuta diagnósticos de red como ping y traceroute desde ubicaciones globales. / Globalping executa diagnósticos de rede como ping e traceroute de locais globais.

toolkits.name: Gmail
toolkits.description: Gmail is Google’s email service, featuring spam protection, search functions, and seamless integration with other G Suite apps for productivity
toolkits.oneLiner: Gmail is a web-based email service for sending, receiving, and organizing electronic messages. / Gmail es un servicio de correo electrónico para enviar, recibir y organizar mensajes. / Gmail é um serviço de e-mail para enviar, receber e organizar mensagens.

toolkits.name: Godial
toolkits.description: GoDial is an automatic call app, mobile CRM, and outbound dialer software that transforms your phone into a call center, enabling efficient management of calls and contacts.
toolkits.oneLiner: GoDial is a mobile CRM and outbound dialer that automates calling and contact management. / GoDial es un CRM móvil y marcador automático que gestiona llamadas y contactos. / GoDial é um CRM móvel e discador automático que gerencia chamadas e contatos.

toolkits.name: Gong
toolkits.description: Gong is a platform for video meetings, call recording, and team collaboration.
toolkits.oneLiner: Gong records, transcribes, and analyzes sales calls to provide actionable insights for revenue teams. / Gong graba, transcribe y analiza llamadas de ventas para ofrecer información útil a los equipos comerciales. / O Gong grava, transcreve e analisa chamadas de vendas para fornecer insights acionáveis para equipes de receita.
useCases: Obtener insights de llamadas de ventas
Detectar objeciones de clientes en tiempo real

toolkits.name: Goodbits
toolkits.description: Goodbits is a service that helps you and your business create stellar newsletters from the best links your team and customers are reading.
toolkits.oneLiner: Goodbits helps you curate links and content to build and send professional email newsletters. / Goodbits te ayuda a curar enlaces y contenido para crear y enviar boletines informativos. / Goodbits ajuda você a curar links e conteúdo para criar e enviar newsletters.
useCases: Organizar enlaces de interés para lectores
Diseñar correos electrónicos de forma rápida
Gerenciar listas de distribuição de e-mail
Compartir contenido relevante con la audiencia

toolkits.name: Goody
toolkits.description: Goody is a platform that enables users to send gifts and physical products without handling logistics, offering APIs for commerce and automation.
toolkits.oneLiner: Goody allows users to send physical gifts and products via API without managing logistics. / Goody permite enviar regalos y productos físicos mediante API sin gestionar logística. / Goody permite enviar presentes e produtos físicos via API sem gerenciar logística.

toolkits.name: Google Address Validation
toolkits.description: The Address Validation API allows developers to verify the accuracy of addresses by validating and standardizing them, and determining their geocode.
toolkits.oneLiner: This tool verifies, standardizes, and geocodes physical addresses to ensure delivery accuracy. / Esta herramienta verifica, estandariza y geocodifica direcciones físicas para asegurar la precisión de entrega. / Esta ferramenta verifica, padroniza e geocodifica endereços físicos para garantir a precisão da entrega.

toolkits.name: Google Admin
toolkits.description: Google Admin Console for managing Google Workspace users, groups, and organizational units.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Admin manages users, groups, and organizational settings for Google Workspace accounts. / Google Admin gestiona usuarios, grupos y configuraciones organizativas para cuentas de Google Workspace. / O Google Admin gerencia usuários, grupos e configurações organizacionais para contas do Google Workspace.

toolkits.name: Google Analytics
toolkits.description: Google Analytics tracks and reports website traffic, user behavior, and conversion data, enabling marketers to optimize online performance and customer journeys
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Analytics tracks website traffic and user behavior to help optimize online performance. / Google Analytics rastrea el tráfico web y el comportamiento del usuario para optimizar el rendimiento online. / O Google Analytics rastreia o tráfego do site e o comportamento do usuário para otimizar o desempenho online.

toolkits.name: Google Chat
toolkits.description: Google Chat API integration for messaging and collaboration in Google Workspace
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Chat enables direct messaging and team collaboration within Google Workspace. / Google Chat permite mensajería directa y colaboración en equipo dentro de Google Workspace. / O Google Chat permite mensagens diretas e colaboração em equipe no Google Workspace.

toolkits.name: Google Classroom
toolkits.description: Google Classroom is a free web service developed by Google for schools that aims to simplify creating, distributing, and grading assignments
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Classroom helps teachers create, distribute, and grade assignments online. / Google Classroom ayuda a los profesores a crear, distribuir y calificar tareas en línea. / O Google Classroom ajuda professores a criar, distribuir e avaliar tarefas online.

toolkits.name: Google Cloud Vision
toolkits.description: Google Cloud Vision API enables developers to integrate vision detection features into applications, including image labeling, face and landmark detection, optical character recognition (OCR), and explicit content tagging.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Cloud Vision analyzes images to identify objects, text, faces, and landmarks. / Google Cloud Vision analiza imágenes para identificar objetos, texto, rostros y lugares. / O Google Cloud Vision analisa imagens para identificar objetos, textos, rostros e pontos turísticos.

toolkits.name: Google Maps
toolkits.description: Integrate Google Maps to access location data, geocoding, directions, and mapping services in your application.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Maps provides location data, routing, and interactive maps for your applications. / Google Maps proporciona datos de ubicación, rutas y mapas interactivos para sus aplicaciones. / O Google Maps fornece dados de localização, rotas e mapas interativos para suas aplicações.
useCases: Display store locations on a map

toolkits.name: Google Search Console
toolkits.description: Google Search Console provides tools to monitor, maintain, and troubleshoot your site's presence in Google Search results.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Search Console helps you monitor and troubleshoot your website's performance in Google Search results. / Google Search Console le ayuda a monitorear y solucionar problemas de rendimiento de su sitio en los resultados de búsqueda de Google. / O Google Search Console ajuda você a monitorar e solucionar problemas de desempenho do seu site nos resultados de pesquisa do Google.
useCases: Revisar el rendimiento de palabras clave

toolkits.name: Google Ads
toolkits.description: Google Ads, is an online advertising platform developed by Google, where advertisers bid to display brief advertisements, service offerings, product listings, and videos to web users.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Ads allows businesses to display advertisements to users across Google's network. / Google Ads permite a las empresas mostrar anuncios a usuarios en la red de Google. / O Google Ads permite que empresas exibam anúncios para usuários na rede do Google.

toolkits.name: Google BigQuery
toolkits.description: Google BigQuery is a fully managed data warehouse for large-scale data analytics, offering fast SQL queries and machine learning capabilities on massive datasets
toolkits.oneLiner: Google BigQuery is a serverless data warehouse for analyzing massive datasets using SQL. / Google BigQuery es un almacén de datos sin servidor para analizar grandes conjuntos de datos usando SQL. / O Google BigQuery é um data warehouse sem servidor para analisar grandes conjuntos de dados usando SQL.

toolkits.name: Google Calendar
toolkits.description: Google Calendar is a time management tool providing scheduling features, event reminders, and integration with email and other apps for streamlined organization
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Calendar manages schedules, tracks appointments, and sends event reminders. / Google Calendar gestiona agendas, rastrea citas y envía recordatorios de eventos. / O Google Calendar gerencia agendas, rastreia compromissos e envia lembretes de eventos.

toolkits.name: Googlecontacts
toolkits.description: Access and manage Google Contacts data via the Google People API
toolkits.oneLiner: Access, create, and update your Google Contacts information programmatically. / Accede, crea y actualiza tu información de Google Contacts. / Acesse, crie e atualize suas informações do Google Contacts.

toolkits.name: Google Docs
toolkits.description: Google Docs is a cloud-based word processor with real-time collaboration, version history, and integration with other Google Workspace apps
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Docs is a cloud-based word processor for creating, editing, and collaborating on documents in real-time. / Google Docs es un procesador de textos en la nube para crear, editar y colaborar en documentos en tiempo real. / O Google Docs é um processador de texto baseado na nuvem para criar, editar e colaborar em documentos em tempo real.
useCases: Colaborar en equipo en tiempo real

toolkits.name: Google Drive
toolkits.description: Google Drive is a cloud storage solution for uploading, sharing, and collaborating on files across devices, with robust search and offline access
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Drive allows users to store, sync, and share files in the cloud. / Google Drive permite a los usuarios almacenar, sincronizar y compartir archivos en la nube. / O Google Drive permite aos usuários armazenar, sincronizar e compartilhar arquivos na nuvem.

toolkits.name: Googleforms
toolkits.description: Google Forms is a survey administration software that allows users to create and share online forms and surveys.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Forms allows users to create, distribute, and analyze online surveys and questionnaires. / Google Forms permite crear, distribuir y analizar encuestas y cuestionarios en línea. / O Google Forms permite criar, distribuir e analisar pesquisas e questionários online.

toolkits.name: Google Meet
toolkits.description: Google Meet is a secure video conferencing platform that integrates with Google Workspace, facilitating remote meetings, screen sharing, and chat
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Meet enables video calls, screen sharing, and remote collaboration for teams. / Google Meet permite videollamadas, compartir pantalla y colaboración remota para equipos. / O Google Meet permite videochamadas, compartilhamento de tela e colaboração remota para equipes.

toolkits.name: Google Photos
toolkits.description: Google Photos is a cloud-based photo storage and organization service offering automatic backups, AI-assisted search, and shared albums for personal and collaborative media management
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Photos stores, organizes, and shares your photos and videos in the cloud. / Google Photos almacena, organiza y comparte tus fotos y videos en la nube. / O Google Photos armazena, organiza e compartilha suas fotos e vídeos na nuvem.

toolkits.name: Google Sheets
toolkits.description: Google Sheets is a cloud-based spreadsheet tool enabling real-time collaboration, data analysis, and integration with other Google Workspace apps
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Sheets is a cloud-based spreadsheet application for organizing data and collaborating in real-time. / Google Sheets es una aplicación de hojas de cálculo en la nube para organizar datos y colaborar en tiempo real. / Google Sheets é um aplicativo de planilhas na nuvem para organizar dados e colaborar em tempo real.

toolkits.name: Google Slides
toolkits.description: Google Slides is a cloud-based presentation editor with real-time collaboration, template gallery, and integration with other Google Workspace apps
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Slides is a cloud-based application for creating and collaborating on professional presentations. / Google Slides es una aplicación basada en la nube para crear y colaborar en presentaciones profesionales. / Google Slides é um aplicativo baseado na nuvem para criar e colaborar em apresentações profissionais.
useCases: Colaborar en diapositivas en tiempo real

toolkits.name: Google Super
toolkits.description: Google Super App combines all Google services including Drive, Calendar, Gmail, Sheets, Analytics, Ads, and more, providing a unified platform for seamless integration and management of your digital life.
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Super integrates Google services like Drive, Gmail, and Calendar into one unified platform. / Google Super integra servicios de Google como Drive, Gmail y Calendar en una plataforma unificada. / O Google Super integra serviços do Google como Drive, Gmail e Calendar em uma plataforma unificada.

toolkits.name: Google Tasks
toolkits.description: Google Tasks provides a simple to-do list and task management system integrated into Gmail and Google Calendar for quick and easy tracking
toolkits.oneLiner: Google Tasks allows you to create, organize, and manage your daily to-do lists and reminders. / Google Tasks te permite crear, organizar y gestionar tus listas de tareas diarias y recordatorios. / O Google Tasks permite que você crie, organize e gerencie suas listas de tarefas diárias e lembretes.

toolkits.name: Gorgias
toolkits.description: Gorgias is a helpdesk and live chat platform specializing in e-commerce, offering automated support, order management, and unified customer communication
toolkits.oneLiner: Gorgias centralizes customer support tickets and live chat for e-commerce stores. / Gorgias centraliza tickets de soporte y chat en vivo para tiendas e-commerce. / Gorgias centraliza tickets de suporte e chat ao vivo para lojas de e-commerce.

toolkits.name: Gosquared
toolkits.description: GoSquared provides real-time web analytics and customer engagement tools to help businesses understand and interact with their website visitors.
toolkits.oneLiner: GoSquared tracks website visitors in real-time and provides tools for customer engagement. / GoSquared rastrea visitantes del sitio web en tiempo real y ofrece herramientas de interacción con clientes. / O GoSquared rastreia visitantes do site em tempo real e fornece ferramentas de engajamento de clientes.
useCases: Monitor website traffic in real time
Analizar el comportamiento de los visitantes

toolkits.name: Grafana
toolkits.description: Open and composable observability platform for metrics, logs, and traces
toolkits.oneLiner: Grafana visualizes metrics, logs, and traces from multiple data sources in unified dashboards. / Grafana visualiza métricas, registros y trazas de múltiples fuentes de datos en paneles unificados. / O Grafana visualiza métricas, logs e rastreamentos de múltiplas fontes de dados em painéis unificados.

toolkits.name: Grafbase
toolkits.description: Grafbase is a platform that accelerates the development of GraphQL APIs, offering features like edge caching, unified data access, and seamless integration with popular authentication strategies.
toolkits.oneLiner: Grafbase provides a unified GraphQL layer for edge caching and data access. / Grafbase proporciona una capa GraphQL unificada para caché en el borde y acceso a datos. / Grafbase fornece uma camada GraphQL unificada para cache na borda e acesso a dados.

toolkits.name: Granola MCP
toolkits.description: Granola is a meeting notes app that captures transcripts and helps teams search and share conversations. It helps turn meeting context into action items and follow-ups.
toolkits.oneLiner: Granola records meeting transcripts and converts them into actionable tasks and summaries. / Granola graba transcripciones de reuniones y las convierte en tareas y resúmenes. / O Granola grava transcrições de reuniões e as converte em tarefas e resumos.
useCases: Criar listas de tarefas de reuniões
Organizar notas de voz de clientes
Sync meeting insights to project tools

toolkits.name: Graphhopper
toolkits.description: GraphHopper Directions API provides enterprise-grade routing services, including route planning, optimization, geocoding, and more, for various vehicle types.
toolkits.oneLiner: GraphHopper provides routing, navigation, and logistics optimization services for developers. / GraphHopper ofrece servicios de enrutamiento, navegación y optimización logística para desarrolladores. / O GraphHopper oferece serviços de roteamento, navegação e otimização logística para desenvolvedores.

toolkits.name: Griptape
toolkits.description: Griptape is a comprehensive platform offering tools and frameworks for building, deploying, and scaling generative AI applications.
toolkits.oneLiner: Griptape provides frameworks to build, deploy, and scale generative AI applications. / Griptape ofrece marcos para crear, desplegar y escalar aplicaciones de IA generativa. / O Griptape oferece frameworks para criar, implantar e escalar aplicações de IA generativa.
useCases: Desenvolver fluxos de trabalho com IA
Automatizar tareas con modelos de lenguaje
Integrar modelos de IA en software

toolkits.name: Grist
toolkits.description: Grist is a relational spreadsheet platform that combines the flexibility of a spreadsheet with the robustness of a database, allowing users to create custom applications tailored to their data needs.
toolkits.oneLiner: Grist combines spreadsheet flexibility with database power to build custom data applications. / Grist combina la flexibilidad de una hoja de cálculo con la potencia de una base de datos para crear aplicaciones personalizadas. / O Grist combina a flexibilidade de uma planilha com o poder de um banco de dados para criar aplicativos personalizados.

toolkits.name: GroqCloud
toolkits.description: GroqCloud provides high-performance AI inference services, enabling developers to deploy and manage AI models efficiently.
toolkits.oneLiner: GroqCloud provides high-speed AI model inference for developers. / GroqCloud ofrece inferencia de modelos de IA de alta velocidad para desarrolladores. / GroqCloud oferece inferência de modelos de IA de alta velocidade para desenvolvedores.

toolkits.name: GTmetrix
toolkits.description: GTmetrix is a performance testing and monitoring tool that analyzes website speed, provides detailed performance reports, and helps optimize web applications for better user experience.
toolkits.oneLiner: GTmetrix analyzes website speed and provides performance reports to help optimize web applications. / GTmetrix analiza la velocidad del sitio web y proporciona informes de rendimiento para optimizar aplicaciones web. / O GTmetrix analisa a velocidade do site e fornece relatórios de desempenho para otimizar aplicações web.

toolkits.name: Gumroad
toolkits.description: Gumroad simplifies selling digital goods, physical products, and memberships by offering a streamlined checkout, marketing tools, and direct payout options
toolkits.oneLiner: Gumroad enables creators to sell digital products, memberships, and physical goods directly to their audience. / Gumroad permite a los creadores vender productos digitales, membresías y bienes físicos directamente a su audiencia. / Gumroad permite que criadores vendam produtos digitais, assinaturas e bens físicos diretamente para seu público.

toolkits.name: Gusto
toolkits.description: Modern payroll, benefits, and HR management platform for small and medium businesses
toolkits.oneLiner: Gusto automates payroll, tax filings, and benefits administration for small businesses. / Gusto automatiza la nómina, los impuestos y la administración de beneficios para pequeñas empresas. / O Gusto automatiza a folha de pagamento, impostos e a administração de benefícios para pequenas empresas.
useCases: Gestionar el alta de nuevos empleados

toolkits.name: Habitica
toolkits.description: Habitica is an open-source task management application that gamifies productivity by turning tasks into role-playing game elements.
toolkits.oneLiner: Habitica turns your daily tasks and habits into a role-playing game to increase productivity. / Habitica convierte tus tareas y hábitos diarios en un juego de rol para aumentar la productividad. / Habitica transforma suas tarefas e hábitos diários em um jogo de RPG para aumentar a produtividade.

toolkits.name: Hacker News
toolkits.description: Hacker News is a tech-focused news aggregator by Y Combinator, featuring user-submitted stories and discussions on startups, programming, and emerging trends
toolkits.oneLiner: Hacker News is a social news website focusing on computer science and entrepreneurship. / Hacker News es un sitio web de noticias sociales centrado en informática y emprendimiento. / Hacker News é um site de notícias sociais focado em ciência da computação e empreendedorismo.

toolkits.name: HackerRank Work
toolkits.description: HackerRank Work enables coding interviews and technical assessments, providing developers with challenges and real-time collaboration for data-driven hiring decisions
toolkits.oneLiner: HackerRank Work provides technical assessments and coding interviews to evaluate developer skills. / HackerRank Work ofrece evaluaciones técnicas y entrevistas de programación para evaluar habilidades. / O HackerRank Work oferece avaliações técnicas e entrevistas de codificação para avaliar habilidades de desenvolvedores.

toolkits.name: Handwrytten
toolkits.description: Automate your handwritten correspondence. Send real notes with your message written in pen by robots.
toolkits.oneLiner: Handwrytten uses robots to write and mail physical handwritten notes for your business correspondence. / Handwrytten usa robots para escribir y enviar notas manuscritas físicas para su correspondencia comercial. / Handwrytten usa robôs para escrever e enviar notas manuscritas físicas para sua correspondência comercial.
useCases: Send personalized client thank you notes
Enviar tarjetas de agradecimiento a clientes
Follow up with new leads automatically
Enviar cartões de boas-vindas aos clientes

toolkits.name: Happy Scribe
toolkits.description: Happy Scribe offers automatic and professional transcription services, converting audio and video files into text with high accuracy.
toolkits.oneLiner: Happy Scribe converts audio and video files into text using automatic transcription. / Happy Scribe convierte archivos de audio y video a texto usando transcripción automática. / O Happy Scribe converte arquivos de áudio e vídeo em texto usando transcrição automática.

toolkits.name: Harvest
toolkits.description: Harvest is a time-tracking and invoicing tool designed for teams and freelancers, helping them log billable hours, manage projects, and streamline payments
toolkits.oneLiner: Harvest tracks time spent on projects and generates invoices for billable work. / Harvest registra el tiempo dedicado a proyectos y genera facturas por trabajo facturable. / O Harvest rastreia o tempo gasto em projetos e gera faturas para trabalho faturável.

toolkits.name: Hashnode
toolkits.description: Hashnode is a blogging platform tailored for developers, offering tools to create, manage, and publish content seamlessly.
toolkits.oneLiner: Hashnode is a blogging platform for developers to publish technical articles and manage personal tech blogs. / Hashnode es una plataforma de blogs para que los desarrolladores publiquen artículos técnicos y gestionen sus blogs. / Hashnode é uma plataforma de blogs para desenvolvedores publicarem artigos técnicos e gerenciarem seus blogs.

toolkits.name: Headout

toolkits.oneLiner: MoonClerk allows businesses to process recurring and one-time online payments. / MoonClerk permite a las empresas procesar pagos recurrentes y únicos en línea. / O MoonClerk permite que empresas processem pagamentos recorrentes e únicos online.

toolkits.name: Moosend
toolkits.description: Moosend is a cloud-based, AI-powered email marketing solution that allows you to target your audience at scale.
toolkits.oneLiner: Moosend is an email marketing platform for creating newsletters and automating customer communication. / Moosend es una plataforma de email marketing para crear newsletters y automatizar la comunicación con clientes. / Moosend é uma plataforma de e-mail marketing para criar newsletters e automatizar a comunicação com clientes.
useCases: Automatizar el envío de correos electrónicos

toolkits.name: Mopinion
toolkits.description: Mopinion captures user feedback across websites and apps, providing insights, analytics, and reporting to optimize user experiences and drive conversions
toolkits.oneLiner: Mopinion collects and analyzes user feedback from websites and mobile apps to improve digital experiences. / Mopinion recopila y analiza comentarios de usuarios en sitios web y aplicaciones para mejorar experiencias digitales. / Mopinion coleta e analisa feedback de usuários em sites e aplicativos para melhorar experiências digitais.

toolkits.name: More Trees
toolkits.description: More Trees is a sustainability-focused platform planting trees on behalf of individuals or businesses aiming to offset carbon footprints and support reforestation
toolkits.oneLiner: More Trees allows individuals and businesses to plant trees to offset their carbon footprint. / More Trees permite a individuos y empresas plantar árboles para compensar su huella de carbono. / More Trees permite que indivíduos e empresas plantem árvores para compensar sua pegada de carbono.

toolkits.name: Motion
toolkits.description: Motion is an intelligent calendar and project management tool that automatically plans your day, schedules meetings, and helps teams collaborate efficiently.
toolkits.oneLiner: Motion uses AI to automatically schedule tasks, meetings, and projects in your calendar. / Motion usa IA para programar automáticamente tareas, reuniones y proyectos en tu calendario. / O Motion usa IA para agendar automaticamente tarefas, reuniões e projetos em sua agenda.

toolkits.name: Moz
toolkits.description: Moz is an SEO software suite providing keyword research, site audits, rank tracking, and competitive insights to boost organic search visibility
toolkits.oneLiner: Moz provides tools for keyword research, site audits, and rank tracking to improve search engine visibility. / Moz ofrece herramientas para investigación de palabras clave, auditorías de sitios y seguimiento de rankings para mejorar la visibilidad en buscadores. / O Moz oferece ferramentas para pesquisa de palavras-chave, auditorias de sites e rastreamento de rankings para melhorar a visibilidade nos mecanismos de busca.
useCases: Realizar auditorías técnicas de sitios web
Monitorar o desempenho de busca orgânica

toolkits.name: Msg91
toolkits.description: MSG91 is a cloud communication platform offering secure and robust APIs for SMS, WhatsApp, Email, Voice, and more, enabling businesses to connect with their customers across multiple channels.
toolkits.oneLiner: MSG91 provides APIs for sending SMS, WhatsApp, email, and voice messages to customers. / MSG91 ofrece APIs para enviar SMS, WhatsApp, email y mensajes de voz a clientes. / MSG91 oferece APIs para enviar SMS, WhatsApp, e-mail e mensagens de voz aos clientes.
useCases: Enviar alertas de confirmación por WhatsApp
Enviar notificações de marketing por e-mail

toolkits.name: Mural
toolkits.description: Mural is a digital whiteboard platform enabling distributed teams to visually brainstorm, map ideas, and collaborate in real time with sticky notes and diagrams
toolkits.oneLiner: Mural provides a digital whiteboard for teams to brainstorm, map ideas, and collaborate visually in real time. / Mural ofrece una pizarra digital para que los equipos realicen lluvias de ideas, mapeen conceptos y colaboren visualmente en tiempo real. / Mural oferece um quadro branco digital para equipes realizarem brainstorming, mapearem ideias e colaborarem visualmente em tempo real.
useCases: Realizar lluvias de ideas en equipo

toolkits.name: MX Technologies
toolkits.description: MX Technologies provides a comprehensive API platform for aggregating and enhancing financial data, enabling seamless connections to numerous financial institutions.
toolkits.oneLiner: MX Technologies aggregates and enhances financial data from various institutions for developers. / MX Technologies agrega y mejora datos financieros de diversas instituciones para desarrolladores. / MX Technologies agrega e aprimora dados financeiros de diversas instituições para desenvolvedores.

toolkits.name: MXToolbox
toolkits.description: MxToolbox provides a suite of network diagnostic and monitoring tools, including DNS lookups, blacklist checks, and email health analysis.
toolkits.oneLiner: MxToolbox offers network diagnostic tools for DNS lookups, blacklist monitoring, and email health analysis. / MxToolbox ofrece herramientas de diagnóstico de red para consultas DNS, monitoreo de listas negras y análisis de salud de correo. / O MxToolbox oferece ferramentas de diagnóstico de rede para consultas DNS, monitoramento de listas negras e análise de saúde de e-mail.

Monitorar a saúde do servidor de e-mail
Analizar la configuración de registros MX

toolkits.name: Nango
toolkits.description: Nango provides a unified API to integrate with over 250 external APIs, offering pre-built and customizable integrations for various categories such as CRM, HR, and accounting systems.
toolkits.oneLiner: Nango provides a unified API to connect your application with hundreds of external services. / Nango proporciona una API unificada para conectar tu aplicación con cientos de servicios externos. / Nango fornece uma API unificada para conectar sua aplicação a centenas de serviços externos.

toolkits.name: Nanonets
toolkits.description: Nanonets provides an AI-driven Intelligent Document Processing API that transforms unstructured documents into structured data, enabling efficient data extraction and workflow automation.
toolkits.oneLiner: Nanonets uses AI to extract data from documents and automate workflows. / Nanonets usa IA para extraer datos de documentos y automatizar flujos de trabajo. / Nanonets usa IA para extrair dados de documentos e automatizar fluxos de trabalho.

toolkits.name: Nasa
toolkits.description: NASA offers a suite of APIs providing access to a wide range of data, including Earth science, planetary imagery, and technology transfer information.
toolkits.oneLiner: NASA provides APIs to access Earth science data, planetary imagery, and space technology information. / NASA proporciona APIs para acceder a datos de ciencias terrestres, imágenes planetarias e información sobre tecnología espacial. / A NASA fornece APIs para acessar dados de ciências da Terra, imagens planetárias e informações sobre tecnologia espacial.
useCases: Obtener datos científicos de la Tierra
Consultar imágenes de planetas y espacio

toolkits.name: Nasdaq
toolkits.description: Nasdaq Data Link is a cloud-based financial data platform providing access to curated premium and free datasets including equity prices, company fundamentals, earnings estimates, options data, forex rates, and economic indicators through REST and Streaming APIs, with integrations for Python, R, Excel, and SQL.
toolkits.oneLiner: Nasdaq Data Link provides financial data, market insights, and economic indicators via APIs. / Nasdaq Data Link proporciona datos financieros, perspectivas de mercado e indicadores económicos mediante APIs. / O Nasdaq Data Link fornece dados financeiros, insights de mercado e indicadores econômicos via APIs.
useCases: Retrieve forex rates for financial models
Integrate market data into Python scripts

toolkits.name: Needle
toolkits.description: Needle provides retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) tools that enable semantic search across your data, facilitating the development of AI agents and applications.
toolkits.oneLiner: Needle provides RAG tools for semantic search and AI agent development. / Needle ofrece herramientas RAG para búsqueda semántica y desarrollo de agentes IA. / Needle oferece ferramentas RAG para busca semântica e desenvolvimento de agentes de IA.

toolkits.name: Neo4J
toolkits.description: Graph database platform for connected data and real-time analytics
toolkits.oneLiner: Neo4j stores and queries highly connected data using graph structures for real-time insights. / Neo4j almacena y consulta datos altamente conectados usando estructuras de grafos para obtener información en tiempo real. / O Neo4j armazena e consulta dados altamente conectados usando estruturas de grafos para insights em tempo real.

toolkits.name: Neon
toolkits.description: Postgres, on a serverless platform designed to help you build reliable and scalable applications faster
toolkits.oneLiner: Neon provides a serverless PostgreSQL database for building scalable applications. / Neon ofrece una base de datos PostgreSQL serverless para crear aplicaciones escalables. / Neon oferece um banco de dados PostgreSQL serverless para criar aplicações escaláveis.
useCases: hospedar bancos de dados na nuvem

toolkits.name: NetHunt CRM

toolkits.oneLiner: NetHunt CRM integrates sales management and automated email campaigns directly into your Gmail inbox. / NetHunt CRM integra la gestión de ventas y campañas de correo automatizadas directamente en su bandeja de entrada de Gmail. / O NetHunt CRM integra a gestão de vendas e campanhas de e-mail automatizadas diretamente na sua caixa de entrada do Gmail.

toolkits.name: Netsuite
toolkits.description: NetSuite by Oracle is a cloud-based ERP suite that combines accounting, CRM, e-commerce, and inventory management for comprehensive business oversight
toolkits.oneLiner: NetSuite is a cloud-based ERP platform for managing accounting, CRM, and inventory operations. / NetSuite es una plataforma ERP en la nube para gestionar contabilidad, CRM e inventario. / O NetSuite é uma plataforma ERP baseada em nuvem para gerenciar contabilidade, CRM e estoque.

Monitorar fluxo de caixa e despesas

toolkits.name: Neuronwriter
toolkits.description: NeuronWriter is a content optimization tool that leverages semantic SEO and AI to enhance content creation and improve search engine rankings.
toolkits.oneLiner: NeuronWriter uses AI to optimize content for search engines and improve organic rankings. / NeuronWriter usa IA para optimizar contenido para buscadores y mejorar el posicionamiento orgánico. / O NeuronWriter usa IA para otimizar conteúdo para buscadores e melhorar o posicionamento orgânico.

toolkits.name: Neutrino
toolkits.description: Neutrino API provides a suite of general-purpose APIs for various tasks, including data validation, geolocation, and security.
toolkits.oneLiner: Neutrino provides APIs for data validation, geolocation, and security services. / Neutrino ofrece APIs para validación de datos, geolocalización y servicios de seguridad. / O Neutrino oferece APIs para validação de dados, geolocalização e serviços de segurança.

toolkits.name: NeverBounce
toolkits.description: NeverBounce provides email verification services to ensure the validity of email addresses, enhancing deliverability and reducing bounce rates.
toolkits.oneLiner: NeverBounce verifies email addresses to improve deliverability and reduce bounce rates. / NeverBounce verifica direcciones de correo electrónico para mejorar la entregabilidad y reducir las tasas de rebote. / NeverBounce verifica endereços de e-mail para melhorar a entregabilidade e reduzir taxas de rejeição.

toolkits.name: New Relic
toolkits.description: New Relic is a comprehensive observability platform that helps developers and operations teams monitor, debug, and improve their entire stack, including applications, infrastructure, and customer experience.
toolkits.oneLiner: New Relic monitors application performance, infrastructure health, and user experience across your entire software stack. / New Relic monitorea el rendimiento de aplicaciones, la salud de la infraestructura y la experiencia del usuario en toda su pila de software. / O New Relic monitora o desempenho de aplicações, a saúde da infraestrutura e a experiência do usuário em toda a sua pilha de software.

Detectar errores en el código rápidamente
Identificar gargalos na infraestrutura de servidores
Analizar la experiencia del usuario final
Monitorar logs e métricas de sistemas

toolkits.name: NewsAPI
toolkits.description: News API is a simple HTTP REST API for searching and retrieving live articles from all over the web.
toolkits.oneLiner: NewsAPI provides programmatic access to live news articles from sources across the web. / NewsAPI proporciona acceso programático a artículos de noticias en vivo de fuentes de toda la web. / A NewsAPI fornece acesso programático a artigos de notícias ao vivo de fontes de toda a web.

toolkits.name: Nextdns

toolkits.oneLiner: NextDNS filters internet traffic to block ads, trackers, and malicious websites at the network level. / NextDNS filtra el tráfico de internet para bloquear anuncios, rastreadores y sitios maliciosos a nivel de red. / O NextDNS filtra o tráfego da internet para bloquear anúncios, rastreadores e sites maliciosos no nível da rede.

toolkits.oneLiner: Ngrok creates secure tunnels to expose local servers to the internet. / Ngrok crea túneles seguros para exponer servidores locales a internet. / Ngrok cria túneis seguros para expor servidores locais à internet.

toolkits.name: Niftyimages
toolkits.description: Allowing marketers to create dynamic and personalized content for your email campaigns.
toolkits.oneLiner: Niftyimages allows users to add dynamic, personalized images and countdown timers to email campaigns. / Niftyimages permite añadir imágenes dinámicas y temporizadores personalizados a campañas de email. / Niftyimages permite adicionar imagens dinâmicas e cronômetros personalizados a campanhas de e-mail.

toolkits.name: Ninox

toolkits.oneLiner: Ninox is a low-code platform for building custom database applications. / Ninox es una plataforma low-code para crear aplicaciones de bases de datos personalizadas. / Ninox é uma plataforma low-code para criar aplicativos de banco de dados personalizados.

toolkits.name: NocoDB

toolkits.oneLiner: NocoDB converts any database into a collaborative spreadsheet interface with automated REST APIs. / NocoDB convierte cualquier base de datos en una interfaz de hoja de cálculo colaborativa con APIs REST automatizadas. / NocoDB transforma qualquer banco de dados em uma interface de planilha colaborativa com APIs REST automatizadas.

toolkits.name: NoCRM.io

toolkits.oneLiner: noCRM.io helps sales teams track leads and manage the entire deal closing process. / noCRM.io ayuda a los equipos de ventas a rastrear leads y gestionar el proceso de cierre. / O noCRM.io ajuda equipes de vendas a rastrear leads e gerenciar o processo de fechamento.

toolkits.name: Northflank

toolkits.oneLiner: Northflank automates application deployment and infrastructure management across multiple cloud providers. / Northflank automatiza el despliegue de aplicaciones y la gestión de infraestructura en múltiples nubes. / O Northflank automatiza o deploy de aplicações e a gestão de infraestrutura em múltiplas nuvens.

toolkits.name: Notion

toolkits.oneLiner: Notion provides a workspace for notes, documents, wikis, and project management. / Notion ofrece un espacio de trabajo para notas, documentos, wikis y gestión de proyectos. / O Notion oferece um espaço de trabalho para notas, documentos, wikis e gestão de projetos.

toolkits.name: Nozbe Teams

toolkits.oneLiner: Nozbe Teams organizes tasks, projects, and team collaboration in a centralized cloud workspace. / Nozbe Teams organiza tareas, proyectos y la colaboración en equipo en un espacio de trabajo centralizado. / Nozbe Teams organiza tarefas, projetos e a colaboração em equipe em um espaço de trabalho centralizado.

toolkits.oneLiner: Npm manages JavaScript packages and dependencies for Node.js projects. / Npm gestiona paquetes y dependencias de JavaScript para proyectos Node.js. / O Npm gerencia pacotes e dependências JavaScript para projetos Node.js.

toolkits.name: Ntfy

toolkits.oneLiner: Ntfy sends push notifications to your devices using simple HTTP requests. / Ntfy envía notificaciones push a tus dispositivos mediante peticiones HTTP simples. / Ntfy envia notificações push para seus dispositivos usando requisições HTTP simples.

toolkits.name: Nusii proposals

toolkits.oneLiner: Nusii allows users to create, send, and track professional business proposals. / Nusii permite a los usuarios crear, enviar y realizar seguimiento de propuestas comerciales profesionales. / O Nusii permite aos usuários criar, enviar e rastrear propostas comerciais profissionais.

toolkits.name: Nutshell

toolkits.oneLiner: Nutshell is a CRM and email marketing platform for managing sales pipelines and customer contacts. / Nutshell es una plataforma de CRM y marketing por correo para gestionar embudos de ventas y contactos. / Nutshell é uma plataforma de CRM e marketing por e-mail para gerenciar funis de vendas e contatos.

toolkits.oneLiner: This service extracts text from images and documents using optical character recognition. / Este servicio extrae texto de imágenes y documentos mediante reconocimiento óptico de caracteres. / Este serviço extrai texto de imagens e documentos usando reconhecimento óptico de caracteres.

toolkits.name: Oksign

toolkits.oneLiner: Ollama allows you to run and manage large language models directly on your local machine. / Ollama te permite ejecutar y gestionar modelos de lenguaje grandes localmente. / O Ollama permite executar e gerenciar grandes modelos de linguagem localmente.

toolkits.oneLiner: Omnisend automates email and SMS marketing campaigns for ecommerce stores. / Omnisend automatiza campañas de marketing por correo electrónico y SMS para tiendas online. / Omnisend automatiza campanhas de marketing por e-mail e SMS para lojas virtuais.

Gerenciar listas de contatos e leads

toolkits.name: OneDrive

toolkits.oneLiner: OneDrive stores, syncs, and shares files across devices with real-time collaboration. / OneDrive almacena, sincroniza y comparte archivos entre dispositivos con colaboración en tiempo real. / O OneDrive armazena, sincroniza e compartilha arquivos entre dispositivos com colaboração em tempo real.

toolkits.oneLiner: OneDesk combines help desk ticketing and project management tools into a single platform. / OneDesk combina herramientas de tickets de soporte y gestión de proyectos en una sola plataforma. / O OneDesk combina ferramentas de tickets de suporte e gestão de projetos em uma única plataforma.

toolkits.name: Microsoft OneNote

toolkits.oneLiner: Microsoft OneNote is a digital notebook for capturing, organizing, and sharing notes, drawings, and research. / Microsoft OneNote es un cuaderno digital para capturar, organizar y compartir notas, dibujos e investigación. / O Microsoft OneNote é um caderno digital para capturar, organizar e compartilhar notas, desenhos e pesquisas.

toolkits.oneLiner: Onepage provides API endpoints to validate tokens and enrich user or company data. / Onepage ofrece endpoints de API para validar tokens y enriquecer datos de usuarios o empresas. / Onepage fornece endpoints de API para validar tokens e enriquecer dados de usuários ou empresas.

toolkits.name: OneSignal REST API

toolkits.oneLiner: OneSignal provides an API to send push notifications, emails, and SMS messages to your users. / OneSignal proporciona una API para enviar notificaciones push, correos electrónicos y SMS a sus usuarios. / O OneSignal fornece uma API para enviar notificações push, e-mails e SMS para seus usuários.

toolkits.oneLiner: OneSignal manages user authentication and identity for sending targeted push notifications, emails, and SMS messages. / OneSignal gestiona la autenticación de usuarios y la identidad para enviar notificaciones push, correos y SMS dirigidos. / O OneSignal gerencia a autenticação de usuários e a identidade para enviar notificações push, e-mails e SMS direcionados.

toolkits.oneLiner: OpenSea allows users to buy, sell, and trade non-fungible tokens and digital collectibles. / OpenSea permite a los usuarios comprar, vender e intercambiar tokens no fungibles y coleccionables digitales. / OpenSea permite aos usuários comprar, vender e negociar tokens não fungíveis e colecionáveis digitais.

toolkits.name: OpenAI

toolkits.oneLiner: This toolkit enables interaction with OpenAI APIs to manage assistants, files, and models. / Este toolkit permite interactuar con las APIs de OpenAI para gestionar asistentes, archivos y modelos. / Este toolkit permite interagir com as APIs da OpenAI para gerenciar assistentes, arquivos e modelos.

toolkits.oneLiner: OpenCage converts addresses into geographic coordinates and coordinates into addresses using open data. / OpenCage convierte direcciones en coordenadas geográficas y coordenadas en direcciones usando datos abiertos. / OpenCage converte endereços em coordenadas geográficas e coordenadas em endereços usando dados abertos.

toolkits.name: OpenGraph.io

toolkits.oneLiner: OpenGraph.io extracts metadata and social preview information from any website URL. / OpenGraph.io extrae metadatos e información de vista previa social de cualquier URL. / OpenGraph.io extrai metadados e informações de visualização social de qualquer URL.

toolkits.name: Openperplex
toolkits.description: Openperplex API provides powerful, global search capabilities and web content analysis for AI applications.
toolkits.oneLiner: Openperplex provides AI-powered web search and content extraction for applications. / Openperplex proporciona búsqueda web y extracción de contenido con IA para aplicaciones. / Openperplex fornece busca na web e extração de conteúdo com IA para aplicações.

toolkits.oneLiner: OpenRouter provides a unified API to access multiple large language models from various providers. / OpenRouter proporciona una API unificada para acceder a múltiples modelos de lenguaje de varios proveedores. / O OpenRouter fornece uma API unificada para acessar múltiplos modelos de linguagem de vários provedores.

toolkits.name: OpenWeather API

toolkits.oneLiner: Access global weather data, forecasts, and historical records for any location. / Accede a datos meteorológicos, pronósticos y registros históricos de cualquier ubicación. / Acesse dados meteorológicos, previsões e registros históricos de qualquer local.
