toolkits.oneLiner: Seqera manages and monitors scalable Nextflow data analysis pipelines across cloud and on-premises environments. / Seqera gestiona y monitorea pipelines de análisis de datos escalables en la nube y localmente. / Seqera gerencia e monitora pipelines de análise de dados escaláveis na nuvem e localmente.
useCases: Ejecutar pipelines de bioinformática a gran escala
Monitorar a execução de fluxos de trabalho
Gestionar recursos de computación en la nube
Automatizar el procesamiento de datos genómicos

toolkits.name: SerpApi
toolkits.description: SerpApi provides a real-time API for structured search engine results, allowing developers to scrape, parse, and analyze SERP data for SEO and research
toolkits.oneLiner: SerpApi extracts structured data from search engine results pages. / SerpApi extrae datos estructurados de los resultados de búsqueda. / SerpApi extrai dados estruturados de resultados de pesquisa.

toolkits.name: Serpdog
toolkits.description: Serpdog provides APIs for scraping Google search results and related services, enabling developers to access real-time data from Google Search, Maps, Scholar, and more. Note: Serpdog has merged with Scrapingdog but continues to operate independently at api.serpdog.io.
toolkits.oneLiner: Serpdog provides APIs to extract real-time search results from Google and other search engines. / Serpdog proporciona APIs para extraer resultados de búsqueda en tiempo real de Google y otros buscadores. / Serpdog fornece APIs para extrair resultados de pesquisa em tempo real do Google e outros mecanismos de busca.
useCases: Extraer datos de resultados de búsqueda
Coletar dados de sites de busca

toolkits.name: Serphouse
toolkits.description: High Volume API for SEO companies, data mining services, and SEO Tool Suite as a SaaS.
toolkits.oneLiner: Serphouse provides a high-volume API for retrieving search engine results data. / Serphouse proporciona una API de alto volumen para obtener datos de resultados de búsqueda. / Serphouse fornece uma API de alto volume para obter dados de resultados de busca.
useCases: Coletar dados de busca em escala
Extract search engine data for SEO
Extrair resultados de pesquisa para análise

toolkits.name: Serply
toolkits.description: Serply is a fast and accurate search API that provides real-time Google search results, SERP data, and web scraping capabilities. Access Google Search, Bing Search, Google Jobs, Google Scholar, Google News, and more via simple API calls.
toolkits.oneLiner: Serply provides a search API for real-time Google results, SERP data, and web scraping. / Serply proporciona una API de búsqueda para resultados de Google, datos SERP y web scraping en tiempo real. / Serply fornece uma API de busca para resultados do Google, dados de SERP e web scraping em tempo real.
useCases: Obtener datos de resultados de búsqueda
Extrair dados de busca do Google

toolkits.name: Serveravatar
toolkits.description: ServerAvatar is a server management system that helps you manage servers, applications, databases, and deployments through an intuitive API.
toolkits.oneLiner: ServerAvatar provides a dashboard to manage web servers, databases, and application deployments. / ServerAvatar ofrece un panel para gestionar servidores web, bases de datos y despliegues. / O ServerAvatar oferece um painel para gerenciar servidores web, bancos de dados e implantações.

toolkits.name: Servicem8
toolkits.description: ServiceM8 helps field service businesses schedule jobs, send quotes, and manage invoices, offering staff mobile apps and real-time job status tracking
toolkits.oneLiner: ServiceM8 manages field service jobs, scheduling, quotes, and invoicing for mobile teams. / ServiceM8 gestiona trabajos de campo, programación, presupuestos y facturación para equipos móviles. / O ServiceM8 gerencia serviços de campo, agendamento, orçamentos e faturamento para equipes móveis.

toolkits.name: ServiceNow
toolkits.description: ServiceNow is a cloud-based enterprise platform that helps organizations automate and manage digital workflows across IT, HR, customer service, and operations.
toolkits.oneLiner: ServiceNow automates enterprise digital workflows for IT, HR, and customer service operations. / ServiceNow automatiza flujos de trabajo digitales empresariales para TI, RRHH y atención al cliente. / O ServiceNow automatiza fluxos de trabalho digitais corporativos para TI, RH e atendimento ao cliente.

toolkits.name: Sevdesk
toolkits.description: sevDesk is an online accounting software designed for small businesses and freelancers, offering features like invoicing, expense management, and financial reporting.
toolkits.oneLiner: Sevdesk provides online accounting, invoicing, and expense tracking for small businesses. / Sevdesk ofrece contabilidad en línea, facturación y gestión de gastos para pequeñas empresas. / O Sevdesk oferece contabilidade online, faturamento e gestão de despesas para pequenas empresas.

toolkits.name: SharePoint
toolkits.description: SharePoint is a Microsoft platform for document management and intranets, enabling teams to collaborate, store, and organize content securely and effectively
toolkits.oneLiner: SharePoint stores, organizes, and shares documents within a secure team intranet. / SharePoint almacena, organiza y comparte documentos en una intranet segura. / SharePoint armazena, organiza e compartilha documentos em uma intranet segura.

toolkits.name: Shipday
toolkits.description: Making Local Deliveries Easy Globally - Powering Local E-commerce
toolkits.oneLiner: Shipday automates local delivery management and dispatching for businesses. / Shipday automatiza la gestión y el despacho de entregas locales para empresas. / Shipday automatiza a gestão e o despacho de entregas locais para empresas.

toolkits.name: Shipengine
toolkits.description: ShipEngine is a REST API that simplifies shipping processes by integrating with multiple carriers, allowing users to manage shipping labels, track packages, and validate addresses efficiently.
toolkits.oneLiner: ShipEngine provides a REST API to manage shipping labels, track packages, and validate addresses across multiple carriers. / ShipEngine ofrece una API REST para gestionar etiquetas de envío, rastrear paquetes y validar direcciones con múltiples transportistas. / O ShipEngine oferece uma API REST para gerenciar etiquetas de envio, rastrear pacotes e validar endereços com várias transportadoras.
useCases: Obtener tarifas de envío en tiempo real

toolkits.name: Shippo
toolkits.description: Shipping API for e-commerce merchants to create labels, track packages, and manage shipping operations.
toolkits.oneLiner: Shippo provides an API to generate shipping labels, track packages, and manage logistics for online stores. / Shippo ofrece una API para generar etiquetas de envío, rastrear paquetes y gestionar logística para tiendas online. / Shippo fornece uma API para gerar etiquetas de envio, rastrear pacotes e gerenciar logística para lojas online.

toolkits.name: Shopify
toolkits.description: Shopify is an e-commerce platform enabling merchants to create online stores, manage products, and process payments with themes, apps, and integrated marketing tools
toolkits.oneLiner: Shopify is an e-commerce platform for building online stores and managing sales. / Shopify es una plataforma de comercio electrónico para crear tiendas online y gestionar ventas. / Shopify é uma plataforma de e-commerce para criar lojas virtuais e gerenciar vendas.

toolkits.name: Short Io
toolkits.description: Short.io is a URL shortening service that allows users to create branded short links, manage them, and track their performance.
toolkits.oneLiner: Short.io creates branded short links and tracks their click performance. / Short.io crea enlaces cortos personalizados y rastrea su rendimiento. / O Short.io cria links curtos personalizados e rastreia seu desempenho.

toolkits.name: Short Menu
toolkits.description: Short Menu is a URL shortening application that allows users to create and manage short links efficiently.
toolkits.oneLiner: Short Menu creates and manages shortened URLs for easier sharing and tracking. / Short Menu crea y gestiona URLs acortadas para compartir y rastrear fácilmente. / Short Menu cria e gerencia URLs encurtadas para facilitar o compartilhamento e rastreamento.

toolkits.name: Shortcut
toolkits.description: Shortcut aligns product development work with company objectives so teams can execute with a shared purpose.
toolkits.oneLiner: Shortcut tracks software development tasks and aligns engineering work with business goals. / Shortcut rastrea tareas de desarrollo de software y alinea el trabajo con objetivos. / Shortcut rastreia tarefas de desenvolvimento de software e alinha o trabalho com objetivos.
useCases: Planear hojas de ruta de producto

toolkits.name: Shorten.REST
toolkits.description: Shorten.REST is a link shortening and management app that allows you to generate unique, branded URLs with advanced tracking capabilities.
toolkits.oneLiner: Shorten.REST creates branded, trackable short links for your content. / Shorten.REST crea enlaces cortos personalizados y rastreables para tu contenido. / Shorten.REST cria links curtos personalizados e rastreáveis para seu conteúdo.

toolkits.name: Shortpixel
toolkits.description: ShortPixel is an image optimization and compression service that offers APIs and plugins to enhance website performance by reducing image sizes without compromising quality.
toolkits.oneLiner: ShortPixel automatically compresses and optimizes website images to improve loading speeds. / ShortPixel comprime y optimiza automáticamente las imágenes del sitio web para mejorar la velocidad de carga. / O ShortPixel comprime e otimiza automaticamente as imagens do site para melhorar a velocidade de carregamento.

toolkits.name: Shotstack
toolkits.description: Shotstack is a cloud-based platform that enables developers, marketers, and designers to automate the generation of videos, images, and audio at scale using a RESTful API.
toolkits.oneLiner: Shotstack provides a REST API to programmatically generate, edit, and render videos, images, and audio files. / Shotstack ofrece una API REST para generar, editar y renderizar videos, imágenes y audio mediante programación. / O Shotstack fornece uma API REST para gerar, editar e renderizar vídeos, imagens e áudios programaticamente.

toolkits.name: Sidetracker
toolkits.description: Sidetracker is a cookie-free web analytics platform that tracks website visitors, sales funnels, and customer journeys. It provides real-time session tracking, lead management, conversion tracking, and marketing campaign analytics without relying on cookies.
toolkits.oneLiner: Sidetracker provides cookie-free website analytics, visitor tracking, and conversion monitoring. / Sidetracker ofrece analítica web sin cookies, seguimiento de visitantes y monitoreo de conversiones. / Sidetracker oferece análise web sem cookies, rastreamento de visitantes e monitoramento de conversões.
useCases: Monitorear el tráfico del sitio web

toolkits.name: Signaturely
toolkits.description: Signaturely is an electronic signature platform that allows users to sign documents online, offering features like automated signature requests, templates, and integrations with other platforms.
toolkits.oneLiner: Signaturely allows users to sign documents online and request electronic signatures from others. / Signaturely permite a los usuarios firmar documentos en línea y solicitar firmas electrónicas. / O Signaturely permite que os usuários assinem documentos online e solicitem assinaturas eletrônicas.

toolkits.name: Signpath
toolkits.description: SignPath is a code signing service that integrates with your build system to automate the signing of your software artifacts, ensuring their authenticity and integrity.
toolkits.oneLiner: SignPath automates the digital signing of software artifacts to ensure code integrity and authenticity. / SignPath automatiza la firma digital de artefactos de software para garantizar la integridad y autenticidad del código. / O SignPath automatiza a assinatura digital de artefatos de software para garantir a integridade e autenticidade do código.

toolkits.name: Signwell
toolkits.description: SignWell is an electronic signature tool for legally binding e-signatures and faster document signing.
toolkits.oneLiner: SignWell allows users to sign documents electronically and request signatures from others. / SignWell permite a los usuarios firmar documentos electrónicamente y solicitar firmas a otros. / O SignWell permite que os usuários assinem documentos eletronicamente e solicitem assinaturas de terceiros.

toolkits.name: SimilarWeb Digital Rank API
toolkits.description: Provides free access to global website ranking data for benchmarking and competitive analysis.
toolkits.oneLiner: This API provides global website traffic rankings and benchmarking data for competitive analysis. / Esta API proporciona rankings de tráfico web global y datos de benchmarking para análisis competitivo. / Esta API fornece rankings de tráfego web global e dados de benchmarking para análise competitiva.
useCases: Analizar el tráfico de la competencia
Evaluar el alcance de sitios web

toolkits.name: Simla.com
toolkits.description: Simla.com is an omnichannel CRM platform with AI for automating communications, measuring team performance, managing customer data, and integrating delivery services and order management.
toolkits.oneLiner: Simla.com is an omnichannel CRM that automates customer communication, manages orders, and tracks team performance. / Simla.com es un CRM omnicanal que automatiza la comunicación con clientes, gestiona pedidos y mide el rendimiento del equipo. / Simla.com é um CRM omnichannel que automatiza a comunicação com clientes, gerencia pedidos e mede o desempenho da equipe.
useCases: Centralizar mensajes de todos los canales
Gerenciar leads e vendas em um só lugar
Gestionar la base de datos de clientes
Integrar servicios de entrega y logística

toolkits.name: Simple Analytics
toolkits.description: Simple Analytics is a privacy-friendly and simple alternative to Google Analytics, offering straightforward analytics without cookies or trackers.
toolkits.oneLiner: Simple Analytics tracks website traffic and visitor behavior without using cookies or collecting personal data. / Simple Analytics rastrea el tráfico web y el comportamiento de los visitantes sin usar cookies ni recopilar datos personales. / O Simple Analytics rastreia o tráfego do site e o comportamento dos visitantes sem usar cookies ou coletar dados pessoais.
useCases: Ver métricas de visitas al sitio

toolkits.name: Simplekpi
toolkits.description: Beautifully simple KPI software. Create, manage and analyse your Key Performance Indicators from the cloud.
toolkits.oneLiner: Simplekpi allows users to track, manage, and visualize business performance metrics in the cloud. / Simplekpi permite a los usuarios rastrear, gestionar y visualizar métricas de rendimiento empresarial en la nube. / O Simplekpi permite aos usuários rastrear, gerenciar e visualizar métricas de desempenho de negócios na nuvem.

toolkits.name: Simplero
toolkits.description: All-in-one marketing software for course creators, coaches and online marketers.
toolkits.oneLiner: Simplero provides tools for hosting online courses, managing email marketing, and processing payments. / Simplero ofrece herramientas para alojar cursos online, gestionar email marketing y procesar pagos. / O Simplero oferece ferramentas para hospedar cursos online, gerenciar email marketing e processar pagamentos.
useCases: Crear páginas de ventas y embudos
Gerenciar leads e automação de vendas

toolkits.name: Simplesat
toolkits.description: Simplesat captures customer feedback and CSAT scores through surveys, integrating directly with helpdesk systems for real-time performance insights
toolkits.oneLiner: Simplesat collects customer feedback and satisfaction scores by integrating surveys into helpdesk platforms. / Simplesat recopila comentarios de clientes y puntuaciones de satisfacción integrando encuestas en plataformas de soporte. / O Simplesat coleta feedback de clientes e pontuações de satisfação integrando pesquisas em plataformas de suporte.

toolkits.name: Sitespeakai
toolkits.description: SiteSpeakAI enables businesses to automate customer support by creating custom-trained, embeddable GPT chatbots that provide real-time answers about products and services, reducing support tickets.
toolkits.oneLiner: SiteSpeakAI creates custom-trained GPT chatbots to answer customer questions about your products and services automatically. / SiteSpeakAI crea chatbots GPT personalizados para responder automáticamente preguntas de clientes sobre sus productos y servicios. / O SiteSpeakAI cria chatbots GPT personalizados para responder automaticamente perguntas de clientes sobre seus produtos e serviços.

toolkits.name: Skyfire
toolkits.description: Skyfire enables AI agents to autonomously transact and pay for services, creating a seamless payment infrastructure for AI applications.
toolkits.oneLiner: Skyfire allows AI agents to autonomously make payments for services. / Skyfire permite que los agentes de IA realicen pagos de servicios de forma autónoma. / Skyfire permite que agentes de IA realizem pagamentos por serviços de forma autônoma.

toolkits.name: Slack
toolkits.description: Slack is a channel-based messaging platform. With Slack, people can work together more effectively, connect all their software tools and services, and find the information they need to do their best work — all within a secure, enterprise-grade environment.
toolkits.oneLiner: Slack is a messaging platform for team communication and collaboration. / Slack es una plataforma de mensajería para comunicación y colaboración en equipo. / Slack é uma plataforma de mensagens para comunicação e colaboração em equipe.

toolkits.name: Slackbot
toolkits.description: Slackbot gives agents workspace-wide read access to a Slack workspace on behalf of the installing user — search messages and files, browse channel and thread history, and look up users and channels — while continuing to post and react as the bot. Includes direct messages and user email addresses so agents can search across DMs and resolve users by email.
toolkits.oneLiner: Slackbot allows agents to search messages, browse channel history, and manage communications within a Slack workspace. / Slackbot permite a los agentes buscar mensajes, explorar el historial de canales y gestionar comunicaciones en Slack. / O Slackbot permite que agentes pesquisem mensagens, naveguem pelo histórico de canais e gerenciem comunicações no Slack.
useCases: Buscar mensajes en canales de Slack
Consultar histórico de conversas no Slack

toolkits.name: Slite
toolkits.description: Your company knowledge base, on autopilot
toolkits.oneLiner: Slite is a collaborative knowledge base that organizes company documentation and team notes. / Slite es una base de conocimientos colaborativa que organiza documentación y notas de equipo. / Slite é uma base de conhecimento colaborativa que organiza documentação e notas de equipe.

toolkits.name: Smartproxy
toolkits.description: Smartproxy (now Decodo) offers a comprehensive suite of proxy and web scraping solutions, providing users with access to a vast network of residential, datacenter, ISP, and mobile proxies, along with scraping APIs for efficient data collection.
toolkits.oneLiner: Smartproxy provides residential and datacenter proxy networks for web scraping and data collection. / Smartproxy ofrece redes de proxies residenciales y de centros de datos para web scraping y recolección de datos. / Smartproxy oferece redes de proxies residenciais e de data center para web scraping e coleta de dados.

toolkits.name: SMS Alert

toolkits.oneLiner: SMS Alert provides a REST API to send notifications via SMS, RCS, Telegram, and WhatsApp. / SMS Alert ofrece una API REST para enviar notificaciones vía SMS, RCS, Telegram y WhatsApp. / O SMS Alert oferece uma API REST para enviar notificações via SMS, RCS, Telegram e WhatsApp.

Enviar mensagens de confirmação de agendamento
Enviar recordatorios de citas por SMS

toolkits.name: Smtp2go
toolkits.description: SMTP2GO is a reliable email delivery service that ensures your emails reach recipients' inboxes efficiently.
toolkits.oneLiner: SMTP2GO provides reliable email delivery infrastructure for transactional and marketing messages. / SMTP2GO proporciona una infraestructura de entrega de correo electrónico confiable para mensajes transaccionales y de marketing. / O SMTP2GO fornece uma infraestrutura de entrega de e-mail confiável para mensagens transacionais e de marketing.

toolkits.name: SmugMug

toolkits.oneLiner: SmugMug is a platform for photographers to showcase, share, and sell photos and videos. / SmugMug es una plataforma para que los fotógrafos muestren, compartan y vendan fotos y videos. / SmugMug é uma plataforma para fotógrafos exibirem, compartilharem e venderem fotos e vídeos.

toolkits.name: Snapchat
toolkits.description: Snapchat Marketing API and Ads Manager integration for creating and managing ad campaigns, analyzing performance metrics, and accessing business accounts.
toolkits.oneLiner: Snapchat allows businesses to manage ad campaigns and track marketing performance metrics. / Snapchat permite a las empresas gestionar campañas publicitarias y medir métricas de rendimiento. / O Snapchat permite que empresas gerenciem campanhas publicitárias e meçam métricas de desempenho.

toolkits.name: Snowflake
toolkits.description: Snowflake is a cloud-based data warehouse offering elastic scaling, secure data sharing, and SQL analytics across multiple cloud environments
toolkits.oneLiner: Snowflake provides a scalable cloud data warehouse for storing, processing, and analyzing large datasets. / Snowflake ofrece un almacén de datos en la nube escalable para almacenar, procesar y analizar grandes conjuntos de datos. / O Snowflake oferece um data warehouse em nuvem escalável para armazenar, processar e analisar grandes conjuntos de dados.

toolkits.name: Snowflake Basic
toolkits.description: Snowflake is a cloud-based data warehouse offering elastic scaling, secure data sharing, and SQL analytics across multiple cloud environments
toolkits.oneLiner: Snowflake stores and analyzes large datasets in the cloud. / Snowflake almacena y analiza grandes conjuntos de datos en la nube. / Snowflake armazena e analisa grandes conjuntos de dados na nuvem.

toolkits.name: Softr
toolkits.description: Build custom apps and portals from Airtable in minutes with no-code. Softr provides user management and database APIs for building client portals, internal tools, and web applications.
toolkits.oneLiner: Softr turns Airtable data into functional web applications, client portals, and internal tools without coding. / Softr convierte datos de Airtable en aplicaciones web, portales de clientes y herramientas internas sin programar. / O Softr transforma dados do Airtable em aplicativos web, portais de clientes e ferramentas internas sem precisar programar.
useCases: Gerenciar dados de clientes no Airtable

toolkits.name: Solcast
toolkits.description: Solar resource assessment and forecasting data for irradiance and PV power, globally.
toolkits.oneLiner: Solcast provides global solar irradiance and photovoltaic power forecasting data. / Solcast proporciona datos globales de irradiancia solar y pronósticos de energía fotovoltaica. / Solcast fornece dados globais de irradiância solar e previsão de energia fotovoltaica.

toolkits.name: Sourcegraph
toolkits.description: Sourcegraph is a code intelligence platform that enables developers to search, understand, and manage code across large codebases.
toolkits.oneLiner: Sourcegraph allows developers to search, navigate, and analyze large codebases across multiple repositories. / Sourcegraph permite a los desarrolladores buscar, navegar y analizar grandes bases de código en múltiples repositorios. / O Sourcegraph permite que desenvolvedores pesquisem, naveguem e analisem grandes bases de código em múltiplos repositórios.
useCases: Buscar código en todos los repositorios
Localizar referências de funções no código
Detectar vulnerabilidades de seguridad en código

toolkits.name: Specific
toolkits.description: Sales call analytics to drive revenue
toolkits.oneLiner: Specific analyzes sales calls to provide actionable insights for revenue growth. / Specific analiza llamadas de ventas para proporcionar información procesable para el crecimiento de ingresos. / Specific analisa chamadas de vendas para fornecer insights acionáveis para o crescimento da receita.

toolkits.name: Splitwise
toolkits.description: Splitwise helps you split bills and expenses with friends and family.
toolkits.oneLiner: Splitwise tracks shared expenses and balances between friends and family. / Splitwise registra gastos compartidos y saldos entre amigos y familiares. / Splitwise rastreia despesas compartilhadas e saldos entre amigos e familiares.

toolkits.name: Spoki

toolkits.oneLiner: Spoki automates WhatsApp communication for marketing, sales, and customer support. / Spoki automatiza la comunicación por WhatsApp para marketing, ventas y atención al cliente. / Spoki automatiza a comunicação via WhatsApp para marketing, vendas e suporte ao cliente.

toolkits.name: Spondyr

toolkits.oneLiner: Spondyr manages and distributes correspondence templates via API for email, SMS, fax, and postal mail. / Spondyr gestiona y distribuye plantillas de correspondencia vía API para email, SMS, fax y correo postal. / Spondyr gerencia e distribui modelos de correspondência via API para e-mail, SMS, fax e correio postal.

toolkits.name: Spotify
toolkits.description: Spotify is a digital music and podcast streaming service with millions of tracks, personalized playlists, and social sharing features
toolkits.oneLiner: Spotify provides on-demand access to millions of songs, albums, and podcasts. / Spotify ofrece acceso bajo demanda a millones de canciones, álbumes y podcasts. / O Spotify oferece acesso sob demanda a milhões de músicas, álbuns e podcasts.

toolkits.name: Spotlightr

toolkits.oneLiner: Spotlightr hosts videos and tracks viewer engagement to help generate leads and marketing insights. / Spotlightr aloja videos y rastrea la interacción del espectador para generar leads y obtener métricas. / Spotlightr hospeda vídeos e rastreia o engajamento do espectador para gerar leads e métricas.

toolkits.name: Square
toolkits.description: Square provides payment processing, POS systems, invoicing, and e-commerce tools, enabling sellers to accept card payments and manage their business
toolkits.oneLiner: Square enables businesses to process card payments, manage point-of-sale systems, and handle invoicing. / Square permite a las empresas procesar pagos con tarjeta, gestionar sistemas de punto de venta y facturar. / O Square permite que empresas processem pagamentos com cartão, gerenciem sistemas de ponto de venda e emitam faturas.

toolkits.name: SSLMate Cert Spotter API
toolkits.description: Cert Spotter API by SSLMate monitors Certificate Transparency logs to alert users about SSL/TLS certificates issued for their domains, helping detect unauthorized certificates and potential security issues.
toolkits.oneLiner: Cert Spotter monitors Certificate Transparency logs to alert you about new SSL/TLS certificates issued for your domains. / Cert Spotter monitorea registros de transparencia de certificados para alertarle sobre nuevos certificados SSL/TLS emitidos para sus dominios. / O Cert Spotter monitora logs de transparência de certificados para alertá-lo sobre novos certificados SSL/TLS emitidos para seus domínios.

toolkits.name: Stack Ai
toolkits.description: No-Code Platform for Enterprise AI. Build, deploy, and scale AI workflows without code.
toolkits.oneLiner: Stack AI allows users to build and deploy automated artificial intelligence workflows without writing code. / Stack AI permite a los usuarios crear y desplegar flujos de trabajo de inteligencia artificial sin escribir código. / O Stack AI permite aos usuários criar e implantar fluxos de trabalho de inteligência artificial sem escrever código.

toolkits.name: Stack Exchange
toolkits.description: Stack Exchange is a network of Q&A communities where users ask questions, share knowledge, and collaborate on topics like coding, math, and more
toolkits.oneLiner: Stack Exchange is a network of question and answer communities for sharing knowledge. / Stack Exchange es una red de comunidades de preguntas y respuestas para compartir conocimientos. / Stack Exchange é uma rede de comunidades de perguntas e respostas para compartilhar conhecimento.

toolkits.name: Stannp

toolkits.name: Zoho Mail
toolkits.description: Zoho Mail is a secure and ad-free email hosting platform with collaboration tools, calendar integration, and extensive administrative controls
toolkits.oneLiner: Zoho Mail provides secure, ad-free email hosting with integrated calendar and collaboration features. / Zoho Mail ofrece alojamiento de correo seguro y sin publicidad con herramientas de calendario y colaboración. / O Zoho Mail oferece hospedagem de e-mail segura e sem anúncios com ferramentas de calendário e colaboração.

toolkits.name: Zoom
toolkits.description: Zoom is a video conferencing and online meeting platform featuring breakout rooms, screen sharing, and integrations with various enterprise tools
toolkits.oneLiner: Zoom provides video conferencing, screen sharing, and virtual meeting rooms for remote collaboration. / Zoom ofrece videoconferencias, pantalla compartida y salas de reuniones virtuales para colaboración remota. / O Zoom oferece videoconferências, compartilhamento de tela e salas de reunião virtuais para colaboração remota.

toolkits.name: Zoominfo
toolkits.description: ZoomInfo is a go-to-market intelligence platform that provides AI-powered B2B data and sales intelligence to help GTM teams find in-market buyers, build pipeline, and close deals faster.
toolkits.oneLiner: ZoomInfo provides B2B contact data and sales intelligence to help teams identify buyers and close deals. / ZoomInfo proporciona datos de contacto B2B e inteligencia de ventas para ayudar a los equipos a identificar compradores y cerrar tratos. / O ZoomInfo fornece dados de contato B2B e inteligência de vendas para ajudar equipes a identificar compradores e fechar negócios.
useCases: Identificar empresas com intenção de compra
Obtener datos de contacto de empresas
Gerar listas de contatos para prospecção
